name: waves-codex
description: WAVES (Workers, Aggregate, Verify, Extend): wave-based orchestration for Codex. Decompose into independent slices, spawn parallel Codex subagents (or spawn_agents_on_csv) as a bounded wave, verify evidence-backed handoffs, then synthesize. Tuned for Codex roles, config.toml limits, and codex exec fleets. Formerly parallel-orchestrate-codex.
